question_en: How does the chapter explain the value of monetary goods?
choices_en: By shared expectations of future acceptability
explanation_en: Monetary goods are valued through collective expectations that others will also accept them.
explanation_ko: 화폐적 재화의 가치는 다른 사람들도 받아들일 것이라는 공동 기대를 통해 형성된다고 본다.
